　　那么问题来了，什么情绪是最好获得的？
　　答案自然是愤怒，也就是说，让人红温就变强，这叶小白可太熟了。
　　于是乎，叶小白就逐渐开始放飞自我了。
　　“呦，缨子，你不去蹬三轮可惜了！”
　　“呦，反骨南，可萝可御啊……！”
　　“呦，西方神？你瞅你那个*样***…**…你*没了！”
　　“呦，这不克苏鲁吗？你瞅你那个*样…………！”
　　就这样好好的斩神世界，突然冒出来了个喷子，关键这个喷子实力还强，谁拿他也没办法。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e9adc681f4d021411a56ae95d0265203","author":"清风鱼丸","author_id":"","book_id":"7424812975858404377","book_name":"斩神：当代贱神叶小白","book_short_name":"斩神第一喷子","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202830","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":857,"name":"斩神","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=857&name=斩神&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7424813115000226329","read_count":"31042","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1392307"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"610","tags":"男频衍生,系统,穿越,二次元,同人,斩神,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d1dc7b2da0559eab1325d1fc64c07131~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779441179&x-signature=IckrtvfUjZ4KyofbNj%2BP8V6rVlI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"110736514190","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"49"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032317125956E1453A6875E080797A"}"},"rel
